briefdescription.para: The DC Subsystem can work in functional or in bypass mode.

detaileddescription.para: In functional mode, the 2 video streams are blended together and sent to the DisplayPort. In bypass mode, the input video stream is directly forwarded to the DisplayPort.

briefdescription.para: Bypass mode makes DC in pass through mode.
The DC Subsystem supports three presentation modes: Non-live, Live, and Mixed.

detaileddescription.para: In non-live mode, the video streams are fetched from the memory. In live mode, the video streams are sourced from the live video ports. In mixed mode, one video stream is sourced from memory and the other video stream is sourced from one of the live video ports.
In Non live mode, video streams are fetched from memory.

briefdescription.para: In Live mode, video streams come from live video ports.
In Mixed mode, one video come from live source and another from memory.
In mixed mode, one video stream is sourced from memory and the other video stream is sourced from one of the live video ports.

detaileddescription.para: These macros are to denote which of the live video ports are selected as the video source. In live mode, both the video ports are active.
In mixed mode, live video port V01 is selected as video source.

briefdescription.para: In mixed mode, live video port V02 is selected as video source.
In live mode, both live video ports are active.
In non-live mode, both live video ports are disabled.
The first video port V01 supports both audio and video.

detaileddescription.para: The second video port V02 supports video only. These macros are to denote the mode of operation of the live video ports.
Live video port V01 supports both audio and video.

briefdescription.para: Live video port V02 supports video only.
No video port.
These defines are used to denote if alpha channel is enabled or disabled for live video input.

detaileddescription.para: Alpha channel is enabled for live video input.

briefdescription.para: Alpha channel is disabled for live video input.
This defines if SDP is enabled or disabled for live video input.

detaileddescription.para: SDP is enabled for live video input.

briefdescription.para: SDP is disabled for live video input.
The configuration table for devices.
This function initializes the configuration of all instances part of DC subsystem i.e DC, DCDMA, Interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDcSub instance.
is the id of the device from the design.

simplesect.para: Base address and DeviceId is same as the DP Core driver.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes all the data structures of the XDcSub Instance.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDcSub instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the Interface mode for DCSub DC Instance.

detaileddescription.para: DC can be either in bypass mode or functional mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.
is the enum val to enable or disable bypass mode.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the blender background color.

parameterdescription.para: is an pointer to the XDcSub Instance.
is a pointer to the structure XDc_BlenderBgClr

briefdescription.para: This function enables or disables global alpha.

parameterdescription.para: is an pointer to the XDc Instance.

simplesect.para: GlobalAlphaEn = 1, enables the global alpha. GlobalAlphaEn = 0, disables the global alpha. Alpha = 0, transparent Alpha = 255, Opaque Alpha = 8:1 (Alpha value)

briefdescription.para: This function selects the source type for the Video and Graphics input streams that are passed on to the blender block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.
selects the stream coming from the video source1
selects the stream coming from the video source2

briefdescription.para: This function selects the source type for audio stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDcSub instance.
selects the nonlive video1 format
selects the nonlive video2 format

briefdescription.para: This function sets the stream1 format for the live video.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDcSub instance.
is the enum for the live video1 format
is the enum for the live video2 format

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if the correct format has been set. XST_FAILURE if the format is invalid.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the Output Video Format.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.
is the enum for the non-live video format

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if the correct format has been set. XST_FAILURE if the format is invalid.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the scaling factors depending on the source video stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.
Factors is a pointer to the scaling factors needed for scaling colors to 12 BPC.
Factors is a pointer to the scaling factors needed for scaling colors to 12 BPC.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the Stream Color space conversion matrix.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.
is a pointer to the CSCCoeff values
is a pointer to the CSCCOffset values
is a pointer to the CSCCoeff values
is a pointer to the CSCCOffset values

briefdescription.para: This function sets the Output Stream Color space conversion matrix.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.
is a pointer to the CSCCoeff values
is a pointer to the CSCOffset values

briefdescription.para: This function sets the Stream1 Blend enable, disable option.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.
is enables, disables blending for stream
is enables, disables blending for stream

briefdescription.para: This function enables Chroma Keying.

parameterdescription.para: is an pointer to the XDc Instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enables Cursor Blending.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc Instance.
Coordinates.
Video Attributes.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the Audio and Video Clock Source and the video timing source.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

simplesect.para: System uses PL Clock for Video when Live source is in use.

briefdescription.para: This function configures DC Video Clock Select.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.
configures Video Clock mode

briefdescription.para: This function enables the video channel interface between the DCDMA and the DC.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc Instance.
sets the corresponding buffers.
programs burstlength.

briefdescription.para: This function enables the video channel interface between the DCDMA and the DC.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc Instance.
sets the corresponding buffers.
programs burstlength.

briefdescription.para: This function enables End of Line Reset for reduced blanking resolutions.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc Instance.
is to be set while using Reduced Blanking Resolutions.

briefdescription.para: This function enables Extra BS Control for AUDIO_SOFT_RESET.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc Instance.
is to be override the extra BS on link.

briefdescription.para: This function enables SDP from DMA or PL.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc Instance.
sets the corresponding buffers.

briefdescription.para: This function sets SDP Empty Threshold value.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc Instance.
Threshold value.

briefdescription.para: This function enables SDP & Cursor buffers.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc Instance.

memberdef.argsstring: (XDcSub *InstancePtr, XDc_PartialBlendEn Enable1, XDc_PartialBlend *Coords1, XDc_PartialBlendEn Enable2, XDc_PartialBlend *Coords2)
memberdef.name: XDcSub_SetStreamPartialBlend

briefdescription.para: This function enables Partial Blend for both video streams.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc Instance.
Partial Blend Coordinates.
Partial Blend Coordinates.

briefdescription.para: This function configures the register to gate input video on/off at video frame boundary.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.
bits set different control signals

briefdescription.para: This function configures the memory fetch latency.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.
bits sets the offset for early timing

briefdescription.para: This function enables STC Control.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function clears STC Control.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function loads STC Init value.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function Adjust STC value.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function reads VSync STC value and returns it.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function reads External VSync STC value and returns it.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function reads Custom VSync Event STC value and returns it.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function reads Custom VSync Event STC value and returns it.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function returns StcSnapshot value.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function Enable Audio Buffer channel and sets the burst length.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enables audio channel select and programs sample rate.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.
selects the different audio channels.
selects the different sample rates.

briefdescription.para: This function configures DC Audio Clock Select.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.
configures Audio Clock mode

briefdescription.para: This function sets the Interface mode for DCSub DC Instance.

detaileddescription.para: DC can be either in bypass mode or functional mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.
is the enum val to enable or disable bypass mode.

briefdescription.para: This function enables DC Aud mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function disable DC Aud mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function selects the source type for audio stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDcSub instance.
selects the audio stream source type

briefdescription.para: This function configures Dc Video registers in the required sequence.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets audio channel-control bits from active channel count.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.
is active channel count (1 to 8).

briefdescription.para: This function sets Audio Segmented Mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enable DC SDP.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets SDP ACK from either DP or PL.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets Cursor Sdp Ready Interval.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDc instance.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 ck 03/14/25 Initial Version
